notes: Solid snake implementation with smooth interpolation, countdown, bonus items, level progression, and demo AI; minor issues include a buggy demo snake respawn logic (sets dead=true then immediately checks respawn on same frame), the tail-fade interpolation can cause brief visual glitches, and the dying animation color logic has some edge-case inconsistencies, but overall the game is fully playable and polished.
An absolutely flawless implementation with smooth interpolation, input queuing, a demo mode, sound synthesis, and perfect grid math.
A solid and attractive Snake build with working core loop and controls, but interpolation/turn handling and a few edge-case risks keep it well short of flawless.
